response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with strong web/mobile/cloud background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments, but the resume shows no embedded networking, LAN-switch, Linux kernel modification, MACsec, 802.1X, or chip-vendor SDK experience. Critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is not listed (languages are English, Romanian, basic German). The mismatch on hard requirements (Japanese, embedded security, kernel work) outweighs the general engineering strengths.
strengths: Long software engineering track record with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD)
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a measurement IDE
Polyglot background including DLang, Node.js, and Linux familiarity
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency listed (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security stack experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF)
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK work
